description: Build a small npm frontend project using Stimulus, RecyclrJS, Tailwind CSS, and webpack.

objectives.description: Initialize or update package.json in the active project directory.
Install or verify @hotwired/stimulus, recyclrjs, tailwindcss, webpack, and webpack-cli.
Create a browser entrypoint and HTML page for the calculator app.
Create a Stimulus controller that implements calculator interactions.
Reference or exercise RecyclrJS from application source so the dependency is accounted for.
Configure webpack to bundle source assets into dist/bundle.js.
Run a build or equivalent smoke verification and record evidence.

evidence_required: dependencies are recorded or npm ls verifies them
calculator UI and logic exist in source or bundled files
